overview: Two Good Mini Café — a premium street café website in Delhi with a full Swiggy/Zomato-style ordering system. Customers can browse 200+ menu items across 16 categories, add items to a cart, and place orders directly on the website, in addition to WhatsApp ordering.
features: Cart system with quantity controls and live item count badge
Checkout page with delivery details form and order summary
Order confirmation with unique order number
WhatsApp ordering preserved on every menu item
Glassmorphic premium UI with orange, black, white palette
